projectDescription: A React/TypeScript web application for structural and pressure vessel engineering calculations, including support design, seismic/wind load analysis, weld design, and printable engineering reports.
keyFeatures: Pressure vessel support design and analysis (saddle, skirt, legs, lug, ring supports)
Seismic load analysis with ASME/ASCE and COVENIN code support
Wind load analysis with configurable exposure categories
Structural beam and weld design/analysis modules
SI and US unit system support
ASME VIII Div 1 & Div 2 material reference tables
Dark mode and collapsible sidebar interface
publicApiSurface: GET /soporte-diseno — Pressure vessel support design form
GET /soporte-analisis — Pressure vessel support analysis dashboard
GET /basic-tables — ASME VIII Div 1 materials table
GET /data-tables — ASME VIII Div 2 materials table
